name: Anniversary Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Light a charcoal fire.
2. Mix eggs with cream and milk. Add torn-up bread, onion, salt, horseradish, pepper, thyme, and mustard. Stir well, let stand for 10 minutes, then stir again until everything is well moistened and the bread is no longer in pieces. Add ground beef and mix thoroughly.
3. Melt butter with catsup and keep warm.
4. Measure out beef in half-cup increments and form patties. Grill over hot coals on one side. Turn and brush with butter-catsup mixture. Grill other side.
5. Serve hot.
